overview:
## Discussion

This output represents a sample buffer that wraps a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreVideo/cvpixelbuffer-q2e] backed by an [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/IOSurface/IOSurface].

The width, height, and pixel format of the sample buffer reflect what you define in [doc://com.apple.screencapturekit/documentation/ScreenCaptureKit/SCStreamConfiguration]. When capturing multiple windows, the system bases the width and height on the display you pass in through [doc://com.apple.screencapturekit/documentation/ScreenCaptureKit/SCContentFilter]. You can set a background color for multi-window sample buffers by setting [doc://com.apple.screencapturekit/documentation/ScreenCaptureKit/SCStreamConfiguration/backgroundColor]; otherwise the default color is black.

# SCStreamOutputType.screen

**Case**

An output type that represents a screen capture sample buffer.

## Declaration

```swift
case screen
```

## Discussion

This output represents a sample buffer that wraps a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreVideo/cvpixelbuffer-q2e] backed by an [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/IOSurface/IOSurface].

The width, height, and pixel format of the sample buffer reflect what you define in [doc://com.apple.screencapturekit/documentation/ScreenCaptureKit/SCStreamConfiguration]. When capturing multiple windows, the system bases the width and height on the display you pass in through [doc://com.apple.screencapturekit/documentation/ScreenCaptureKit/SCContentFilter]. You can set a background color for multi-window sample buffers by setting [doc://com.apple.screencapturekit/documentation/ScreenCaptureKit/SCStreamConfiguration/backgroundColor]; otherwise the default color is black.

## Output types

- **SCStreamOutputType.audio**: An output type that represents an audio capture sample buffer.
